caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely at a live music event or concert. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The man is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with decorative patterns, including a red and white design on the front. His hair is pulled back, and he appears to be deeply engaged in his performance. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The audience members, partially visible in the foreground, seem attentive and focused on the performer. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance.
